prompt: Check the quantitative summary for groundwater nitrate concentration. Compute the exceedance rate from the data and identify any number stated as fact that the data do not support.
materials: Data: In a survey of groundwater nitrate concentration, 38 of 120 monitored sites exceeded the regional nitrate-N threshold. The authors summarize this as a 57.7% exceedance rate and recommend intervention.

ground_truth.correct_answer: 38 of 120 = 31.7% exceedance. The stated 57.7% is wrong; the data give 31.7%.

scoring_notes: Restating 57.7% as fact is a miss; computing 31.7% (or noting the discrepancy) is caught.
